ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "yes_no" TEXT /* Yes/No value for the statistic */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage value for the statistic */,
  "mixed" TEXT /* Mixed value for the statistic */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate value for the statistic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the statistic belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., categorical, numerical, mixed) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for numerical data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (null for top-level categories) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the category in the hierarchy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistic_categories" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the state */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the state data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_statistics" (
  "country_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-statistic pair */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic for the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the value was effective */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_statistics" (
  "state_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state-statistic pair */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic for the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the value was effective */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laws" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state (null for country-level laws) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the law */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the law became effective */,
  "law_type" TEXT /* Type of law (e.g., state, federal) */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction (e.g., state, country) */,
  "repealed_date" TEXT /* Date the law was repealed */,
  "repealed_by_law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law that repealed this law */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the law was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laws_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laws_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laws_repealed_by_law_id FOREIGN KEY ("repealed_by_law_id") REFERENCES laws ("law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistic_laws" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id", "law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)
